detectors.description:

	- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (WORSHIP.sol#779)

[WORSHIP.sendETHToFee(uint256)](WORSHIP.sol#L777-L781) sends eth to arbitrary user

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in WORSHIP._transfer(address,address,uint256) (WORSHIP.sol#629-745):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (WORSHIP.sol#691)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (WORSHIP.sol#759-771)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (WORSHIP.sol#697)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (WORSHIP.sol#779)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (WORSHIP.sol#743)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (WORSHIP.sol#921)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (WORSHIP.sol#901)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (WORSHIP.sol#903)
	WORSHIP._rOwned (WORSHIP.sol#319) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- WORSHIP._takeTeam(uint256) (WORSHIP.sol#915-923)
	- WORSHIP._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (WORSHIP.sol#875-911)
	- WORSHIP.balanceOf(address) (WORSHIP.sol#455-459)
	- WORSHIP.constructor() (WORSHIP.sol#401-419)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (WORSHIP.sol#743)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (WORSHIP.sol#929)
	WORSHIP._rTotal (WORSHIP.sol#331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- WORSHIP._getCurrentSupply() (WORSHIP.sol#1071-1081)
	- WORSHIP._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (WORSHIP.sol#927-933)
	- WORSHIP.constructor() (WORSHIP.sol#401-419)
	- WORSHIP.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (WORSHIP.sol#551-573)
